reports.text:
Community 0 in IIT Jammu EE Department:
  Faculty: Abhishek Kumar
  ResearchArea: Quantum polar phase transition, Transport in correlated electron systems, Fermi-liquid with spin-orbit coupling, Theory of Raman, electron spin resonance (ESR) and electric-dipole spin resonance (EDSR) spectroscopies, Strongly correlated systems: cuprates high temperature superconductors, flat-band systems
  Relationships: RESEARCHES_IN: 7

Summary: The Community 0 in IIT Jammu's Electrical Engineering Department is led by Faculty member Abhishek Kumar. The group focuses on theoretical research in condensed matter physics, specifically exploring quantum polar phase transitions, transport properties of correlated electron systems, and spectroscopies such as Raman and ESR/EDSR. Their work also involves studying strongly correlated systems like cuprates and flat-band materials.
reports.summary: The Community 0 in IIT Jammu's Electrical Engineering Department is led by Faculty member Abhishek Kumar. reports.text:
Community 7 in IIT Jammu EE Department:
  Department: Department of Physics
  Faculty: Arpita Paul, Bacham Eswar Reddy, Parveen Kumar
  ResearchArea: My research work focuses on first-principles quantum theory of advanced functional materials. It not only aims at achieving microscopic insights into exotic states of fundamentally interesting materials (frustrated magnets, multiferroics, superconductors, Hund’s metals and topological superconductors), but also designing materials of technological importance (multiferroics, superconductors and transparent conductors), Open Quantum Systems, Quantum Measurements, non-Hermitian Physics, Quantum Error Correction
  Relationships: RESEARCHES_IN: 10, MEMBER_OF: 3

Summary: The Community 7 in IIT Jammu's Electrical Engineering Department is a research cluster focused on advanced functional materials. Led by faculty members Arpita Paul, Bacham Eswar Reddy, and Parveen Kumar, this group explores topics such as quantum theory, open quantum systems, non-Hermitian physics, and quantum error correction. Their research aims to design materials with technological importance, including multiferroics, superconductors, and transparent conductors.
reports.summary: The Community 7 in IIT Jammu's Electrical Engineering Department is a research cluster focused on advanced functional materials. Summary: The Community 17 in IIT Jammu's Electrical Engineering Department is led by Dr. Sanat Kumar Tiwari, a faculty member with expertise in plasma physics. His PhD students, Ab Rauoof Wani, Farida Batool, and Sachin Sharma, are working under his supervision on various research areas related to plasmas, including thermodynamics, magnetized ultracold plasmas, and computational plasma physics. This group is focused on experimental and computational studies of complex plasma phenomena, with a strong emphasis on understanding the behavior of plasmas in different conditions.
